title: Domain I: Regulatory & Compliance
description:
### Domain I: Regulatory & Compliance

Focuses on the legal and ethical framework of public procurement, including the Uniform Commercial Code (UCC), Law of Agency, and anti-competitive practices.

**Topics Included:**
*   **UCC Foundations:** Warranties (Express/Implied), Shipping Terms (FOB), and Rights of Buyer/Seller.
*   **Law of Agency:** Types of Authority (Actual Express/Implied, Apparent) and Fiduciary Duties.
*   **Contract Law Basics:** Essential elements (Offer, Acceptance, Consideration) and enforceability.
*   **Legal Frameworks:** Common Law vs. Statutory Law and the Statute of Frauds.
*   **Ethics & Compliance:** Identifying Collusion, Bid-rigging, and Conflicts of Interest.
seo_title: CPPB Domain I Practice Test: Regulatory & Compliance Concepts
seo_description: Master CPPB Domain I with this practice test. Review UCC, Law of Agency, and procurement ethics for the Certified Professional Public Buyer exam.

title: Domain II: Pre-Solicitation Planning
description:
### Domain II: Pre-Solicitation Planning

Covers the critical first steps of the procurement lifecycle, focusing on strategic integration, needs analysis, and market research.

**Topics Included:**
*   **Strategic Integration:** Aligning procurement with organizational goals and stakeholder management.
*   **Needs Analysis:** Spend analysis, Lease-vs-Buy (NPV), and Total Cost of Ownership (TCO).
*   **Market Research:** Supply positioning (Kraljic Matrix), demand forecasting, and value analysis/engineering.
*   **Procurement Strategy:** Standardization, demand aggregation, and unbundling.
*   **Information Gathering:** Using RFIs, Sources Sought notices, and Draft RFPs effectively.
seo_title: CPPB Domain II Practice Test: Pre-Solicitation Planning Sourcing
seo_description: Prepare for the CPPB exam with Domain II practice questions. Focus on spend analysis, market research, and strategic procurement planning.

title: Domain III: Sourcing & Supplier Selection
description:
### Domain III: Sourcing & Supplier Selection

Evaluates the methods and processes used to select the right supplier, from formal bidding to alternative sourcing methods.

**Topics Included:**
*   **Competitive Methods:** Detailed knowledge of IFB/ITB, RFP, and Multi-step bidding processes.
*   **Professional Services:** Qualification-Based Selection (QBS) and the Brooks Act.
*   **Alternative Sourcing:** Justifying Sole Source, Single Source, and Emergency Purchases.
*   **Evaluation Techniques:** Best Value determination, weighted scoring matrices, and responsiveness/responsibility.
*   **Informal Sourcing:** Efficient use of Request for Quotations (RFQ) for small-dollar purchases.
seo_title: CPPB Domain III Practice Test: Sourcing & Supplier selection
seo_description: Review CPPB Domain III concepts including competitive bidding (IFB, RFP), QBS, and sole source justifications with our free practice test.
